closure.reading: the middle and late cascades both confirm that a stack of functional students diverges from the teacher; the late stratum reaches skill 0.098 in four layers. Regenerating the artifacts the lane had overwritten did not change the verdict, it strengthened it.

decisive_evidence.experiment: perturbation magnitude sweep through teacher layers, run at the early, middle and late strata
decisive_evidence.finding: the residual stream is expansive at every tested magnitude, and amplification is worst at the smallest perturbations

single_layer_token_effect.probe: 1024-row logit-lens vocabulary subset through the final norm from layer 39
single_layer_token_effect.reading: one functional layer out of 75 already changes the greedy token at nearly half of all positions

student_in_every_layer_L74.note: the late stratum compounds worse than the middle: four student layers drive the state to skill 0.098, essentially uncorrelated with the teacher

FS0_reproduction.detail: fresh process, four fresh seeds, disjoint score split; student h1024 skill 0.5318 lower 0.5232 centered 0.7309 at 0.010375 local BPW; seed spread 0.0025

FS1_block_insertion.detail: block_output = post_attention_hidden + post_moe exactly; student block skill 0.8806 lower 0.8786 centered 0.9385

FS2_next_layer_propagation.reason_for_failure: the single-step null-corrected score is positive, but the error grows through the layer rather than decaying

FS3_layer_strata.detail: each stratum fitted and scored independently

FS4_cross_layer_sharing.detail: every cross-layer application of a fitted readout scores negative skill; there is no sharing saving available because the feature map is already a shared seed

FS5_corpus_and_seed_replication.detail: 4 student seeds x 6 splits never fitted on, including protected-domain and long-context holdouts

FS6_complete_physical_auction.detail: complete-model rate is legal at every rung once the protected organs are compressed, and was never the binding constraint

next_action: carry the corrected, function-first, amplification-first methodology to the next architecture parent
not_evidence_of: capability, full-model quality, or behaviour. Every score is on bounded calibration batches of 4096 held-out positions from a sealed corpus, and the token-level number is a 1024-row logit-lens probe rather than the model's head.
one_line: The functional escape is real, reproduces, and replicates across layers, documents, domains and seeds, but the GLM-5.2 residual stream amplifies every perturbation it is given, so a per-layer student does not compose into a model.
retained: the null-corrected metric contract, now global
the CPU authority and the three parity-gated Metal grammars
the amplification probe, which is now a mandatory next-parent gate
why_not_admitted: FUNCTIONAL_STREAM_ADMITTED requires FS1 through FS7. FS2's composition gate and FS7 both fail. Streaming 1.51 TB to build a representation whose error grows 1.42x to 2.41x per layer would be spending the source on a known-negative outcome.
why_not_refuted: FUNCTIONAL_ESCAPE_REFUTED would require the student to fail a null-corrected block, propagation or cross-layer replication gate. It passes the block gate decisively (0.881 skill against a 0.197 no-MoE control), replicates on all four sparse strata, and replicates on six unfitted splits and four seeds without refit. The single-step propagation score is also positive. What fails is composition over depth, which is FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY by the contract's own definition.
